## ✅ DevSecOps Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] My code compiles and passes local tests.
- [ ] I have **not hardcoded any secrets** (strict use of Infisical via environment variables).
- [ ] I have added or updated unit/integration tests.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if necessary.
- [ ] (Workers/API) New endpoints respect RBAC constraints.
